news.t: Health-care ETFs win the week as Biden presidency affirms Obamacare
Health-care stocks could rebound after their worst week of the year

holdings.infoBox: FHLC is an equity ETF with a total of 342 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 13.97%, Johnson & Johnson at 8.91%, AbbVie at 6.18%, UnitedHealth Group at 5.69%, and Merck & Co. at 4.52%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Health Care Index ETF (FHLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI US IMI 25/50 Health Care index, a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the broad US health care sector. FHLC was launched on Oct 21, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: ETF strategies helped pivot investors ‘away from consumer discretionary tech': Expert
data.text: Pacer ETFs President Sean O'Hara joins Yahoo Finance Live anchors Seana Smith and Dave Briggs to weigh in on the state of the ETF market and shares his thoughts on the Fed's approach to tamp down infl...

data.title: Health-care ETFs win the week as Biden presidency affirms Obamacare
data.text: Health-care exchange-traded funds ticked down fractionally in Friday morning trading, but were still on track to be the top performing sector for the week.

data.title: Biotech stocks fall after Trump promises executive order drug prices
data.text: CNBC's Meg Tirrell reports on the dip in biotech stocks after President Donald Trump promised that an executive order on drug prices is coming.

data.title: Health-care stocks could rebound after their worst week of the year
data.text: Health care's sharp drop comes as investors worry that left-leaning policy ideas like universal health coverage are gaining support.
